calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Thomas Porta for Adolpho Ramos

Mr. Porta stated that his client asked to pay the attorney's fees early, received notice of settlement, and allowed his client to pay him. The Petition for Final Distribution is Taken Under Submission. Mr. Porta provides in open court a new proposed order with corrections to attorney's fees.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-13-2017 Continued To Feb-21-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Porta appeared by telephone for Adolpho Ramos (Petitioner).
Amanda Ebey for Nemesio Ramos (Objector).

Ms. Ebey stated that both Parties are interested in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than January 31, 2018. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by February 7, 2018. Status on close of estate is continued to and the Parties are to return on February 21, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
